span.p: Monthly run cost (single Hetzner host topology)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compute box (AX line)
Ryzen 9 · 128 GB · 2×NVMe RAID1
≈ €105–130/mo — the DB+app plane for all 3 envs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Object tier — 50 TB+ assets
Volume (grow) OR SX server (bulk)
≈ €5–60/mo (Volume) … €90–200/mo (SX)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Backup secondary — Storage Box
off-host WAL + base + asset snapshots
≈ €12–40/mo

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GPU node (HelixLLM)
OPERATOR WORKSTATION — €0 cloud cost
(or a rented GPU box if externalized later)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Offset by subscription + metered billing (Q11)
ARPU × paying accounts − COGS/account ≥ 0
